label: grn_from_po_wizard
translation_notes: window.Modal + Stepper → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with custom StepIndicator built from shadcn Steps or a plain ol ordered list of badges
Local React.useState for lines/step/completed → useReducer or Zustand slice; step state should be URL-sync'd via nuqs for deep-linking
Inline mock WH_POS_RECEIVING table → Server Component parent fetches POs via Drizzle query with status in ('confirmed','partially_received') and date filter; pass as prop
Multi-LP row grid (addRow/removeRow/updateRow) → react-hook-form useFieldArray; each row is a typed FieldArray element validated by Zod (qty > 0, expiry required, etc.)
poLines sample data with fully_received guard → backend-computed remaining_qty per PO line; row disabled + badge shown server-side
LP preview table in step 3 → optimistic preview computed from form state; real LP numbers assigned server-side on submit
submit() with setTimeout mock → Server Action; on success invalidate GRN list + LP list via revalidatePath; emit outbox event grn.created
Hardcoded PL product names and PO IDs → next-intl keys for labels; all IDs from real DB
Print label checkbox options → separate printQueue server action called after GRN creation, or a POST to label-service endpoint
Alert banners (alert-blue/alert-green) → shadcn Alert with variant='default' or custom colors via CSS vars

label: grn_from_to_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; mark as size='wide' via DialogContent className override

transitLps inline array + checkbox toggle → Server Component fetches TO's shipped LPs from lp table (status='transit', to_order_id=TO.id); mark-received is a Server Action bulk-updating LP status + location
Row-level location select rendered only when checked → conditional FormField inside react-hook-form field array, revealed via watch()
Scan input (autoFocus) → useRef + barcode scanner keyboard wedge listener; debounce 150ms before LP lookup
Hardcoded TO reference and supplier names → props from parent page fetching TO details via Drizzle
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: stock_move_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; form state with single useState object → useForm + zodResolver with discriminated union schema per moveType

isPartial / needsApproval derived booleans → Zod refine or superRefine; >10% adjustment triggers approval flow, not block — translate to a separate 'submit for approval' Server Action that writes to movement_approvals table
Inline LP lookup (lp input + Scan button) → combobox backed by /api/lps?q= server route or tRPC procedure; selected LP data fetched and shown below
Hardcoded destination options list → fetched from locations table filtered by warehouse and active=true
reasonRequired gated reason-code selects → dynamic Zod schema based on moveType; reason_code enum validated against allowed_reasons per move type from DB config
alert-amber >10% warning banner → shadcn Alert with variant='warning'; should also persist to audit log via Server Action
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: lp_split_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; rows array state → useFieldArray in react-hook-form; each row typed with qty (number), dest (string), label (boolean)
Sum validator (sum === lp.qty) → Zod schema-level refine on the array: total_allocated must equal source_qty; surface via FormMessage
alert-box color tristate (green/amber/red) based on sum → shadcn Alert variant driven by computed status; keep accessible with aria-live
Destination location selects → ComboboxAsync backed by locations API; pre-selected to source LP location
LP genealogy record note → reminder for Server Action to write lp_genealogy row with operation='split' linking parent LP id to all child LP ids
Catch weight proration note → backend calculation, not UI; document in Server Action contract
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: lp_merge_modal
translation_notes: 2-step wizard with Stepper → Dialog with internal step state; Stepper is a custom primitive; in production use a shadcn Steps pattern or Radix Tabs with disabled navigation
Primary LP scan + validation card → Server Action or tRPC query to validate LP eligibility (status=available, not intermediate); show inline validation result

Secondary LP scan loop with per-row validation (same batch ±1 day, same QA, same product) → useFieldArray; each scan triggers a Server mutation that validates and appends or returns a rejection reason
Rejected LP row with red background → TableRow with destructive variant styling and error reason inline
Summary with totalAfter computed → derived from useWatch over the field array; server must re-validate final totals on submit
Genealogy record note → Server Action creates lp_genealogy rows (operation='merge') for each secondary LP pointing to primary
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: qa_status_change_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; transitions map (PASSED→[HOLD], etc.) → fetched from qa_state_machine config table or hardcoded enum in Zod schema if immutable
Dynamic reason-code select per target state → driven by transition config; in production pull allowed reason codes from qa_transitions table per (from_state, to_state) pair
COND_APPROVED and QUARANTINED alert banners → shadcn Alert with variant and contextual guidance; also gate shipping in a separate rule check server-side
valid computed flag gating submit → Zod formSchema.safeParse() result; disable button on !form.formState.isValid
Submit → Server Action: update lp.qa_status, insert quality_status_history row, emit outbox event qa_status_changed; RBAC guard required (QA role minimum)
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: label_print_modal
translation_notes: HTML label preview (.label-preview div) → real ZPL/EPL rendering is a backend concern (BL-WH-04); in production render a React-based preview using the same field layout, but actual print job is sent as ZPL to the label service
WH_PRINTERS mock array → fetched from printers table (id, name, online status via last_heartbeat); poll or SSE for live online status
Queue checkbox → when checked, submit prints to a print_queue table with status='pending'; a background worker/cron drains the queue
Reprint history table → fetched from label_events table filtered by lp_id, ordered by printed_at desc; paginate or limit to last 10
Printer offline guard → server-side validation in Server Action; if printer offline and queue=false, return error; queue path always succeeds
isExpired / BLOCKED stamp → derive from lp.expiry vs today server-side; never trust client-computed value for safety-critical display
Hardcoded PL labels and template names → next-intl keys; template list from label_templates table
BL-WH-04 known: preview is HTML-structured, not real ZPL — production must integrate with label service

label: reserve_lp_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; form with LP picker and qty → useForm + zodResolver; LP field is a ComboboxAsync or scanner input
LP card shown after selection → data fetched via tRPC or Server Action by LP id; show product, qty, expiry, location
expBefore / conflict / isIntermediate derived warning banners → computed server-side in a validation Server Action called on LP select; return structured warnings as part of response
conflict alert (already reserved for another WO) → real DB check in Server Action: SELECT FROM lp_reservations WHERE lp_id=? AND status='active'
isIntermediate guard → check lp.item_type in ('intermediate') on server; block UI if true with V-WH-FEFO-005 message
Submit → Server Action: insert lp_reservations row, update lp.status='reserved', emit outbox event lp.reserved; RBAC: Warehouse Operator minimum
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: release_reservation_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with destructive variant styling on footer button

reason select with admin_override conditional text → Zod discriminated union schema; admin_override branch requires reasonText min 10 chars; RBAC guard for admin_override reason code (Manager/Admin role only)

Submit → Server Action: update lp_reservations.status='cancelled', update lp.status='available', insert audit event lp_reservation_released with reason code; high-visibility audit log for admin_override
Summary component → KeyValueList or Description List using shadcn primitives (no direct equivalent; compose from dl/dt/dd with Tailwind)
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: fefo_deviation_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; both LP comparison cards (.fefo-compare) → a 2-column grid with Card components side by side; 'suggested' vs 'selected' styling via border/accent classes
Reason code list (batch_exhaustion, qa_release, etc.) → enum in Zod validated against fefo_deviation_reasons config table; 'other' branch requires reasonText
Submit (Confirm deviation) → Server Action: proceed with the picked LP, insert fefo_overrides row with reason, picked_lp, suggested_lp, expiry_delta_days; emit outbox event fefo_deviation_logged
fefo_override_rate metric note → aggregate query from fefo_overrides table for dashboard KPI; not computed in this modal
Cancel path → dismiss modal and use the FEFO-suggested LP (pass suggestedLpId as prop, caller re-executes pick with that LP)
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: destroy_scrap_lp_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with btn-danger confirm button; irreversible action pattern — require explicit checkbox confirmation before enabling submit
qtyToScrap < lp.qty triggers partial scrap note → Zod refine: if qty < source qty, note that a split will occur server-side before scrap; communicate this in help text
reason + reasonText (min 10 chars) mandatory → Zod schema: reason required enum, reasonText required string min(10)
confirmed checkbox → Zod boolean literal(true) field; without it form is invalid

Submit → Server Action: if partial, split LP first (creates new LP for remainder), then set scrap LP status='scrapped', insert stock_adjustment with qty=-qtyToScrap, insert audit record; emit outbox event lp.scrapped; RBAC: Warehouse Operator minimum; Manager for qty > threshold
Hardcoded PL labels + reason codes → next-intl keys; reason codes from scrap_reasons config table
BL-PROD-05: .btn-danger missing from production.css — ensure it is included in shared design token import

label: use_by_override_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; isManager prop → derive from session RBAC; if not Manager, render read-only message with no form and no override button
ack checkbox + reason + reasonText all required → Zod schema with all three mandatory fields; submit disabled until valid
Override reason codes (operational_requirement, etc.) → from use_by_override_reasons config table; hardcoded enum acceptable if immutable

Submit → Server Action: insert use_by_override_log row with lp_id, manager_user_id, reason_code, reason_text, overridden_at; set lp.use_by_override_active=true with expiry; emit compliance outbox event; RBAC: Manager or Admin role required (enforce server-side)
EU 1169/2011 reference in alert → static text; no i18n needed for regulatory citation but localize surrounding text
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: location_edit_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; create/edit duality via editing boolean (data prop present or not) → same modal, Server Action upserts via id presence
depthExceeded validator (parent.split('.').length >= 3) → server-side check against tenant max_depth setting from warehouse_settings table; also validate client-side via Zod refine
parent location select → ComboboxAsync backed by /api/locations?warehouse=X&maxLevel=2; show ltree path as label
code → uppercase transform on input (toUpperCase()) → Zod transform or onChange handler; validate uniqueness server-side in Server Action

Submit → Server Action: INSERT or UPDATE locations row, validate uniqueness of code within warehouse, validate depth ≤ tenant limit; emit outbox event location.created or location.updated; RBAC: Admin role required
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys; type options from location_types config

label: cycle_count_adjustment_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; P1 stub warning banner → shadcn Alert variant='default'; note in translation that full cycle count (BL-WH-01) is a separate Phase 2 feature
delta and deltaPct computed from actual vs system qty → Zod refine that also computes delta; expose delta as a read-only display field, not a form field
needsApproval (>10%) → same pattern as StockMoveModal; button label and Server Action path change; insert into movement_approvals table if approval needed
reason + conditional reasonText → Zod discriminated union; 'other' branch requires reasonText min 10 chars
Submit → Server Action: update lp.qty, insert stock_adjustment row with delta + reason, if deltaPct > 10 insert into movement_approvals; emit outbox event stock_adjustment_created
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: state_transition_confirm_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; isDestructive → pass transition direction as prop; destructive transitions use btn-danger variant (fix BL-PROD-05 first)
transitions map (blocked→, available→) → server-driven allowed_transitions per from_state from lp_state_machine_v1 rule; do not hardcode in client
reason codes per to_state → dynamic from lp_state_transitions config table; avoid hardcoded switch in client
Submit → Server Action: update lp.status, insert lp_state_history row with from/to/reason/user/timestamp; emit outbox event lp.status_changed; validate allowed transition server-side before applying
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: force_unlock_scanner_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='sm' → Dialog with smaller max-w override via className on DialogContent
Hardcoded LP and user → props from dashboard alert; data fetched from scanner_locks table (lp_id, locked_by_user, locked_at, last_heartbeat)
Submit (Force release) → Server Action: delete scanner_locks row, insert audit event scanner_lock_force_released with admin_user_id; RBAC: Admin role required
Duration display '7 min' → computed from locked_at vs now server-side; pass as prop
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: warehouse_dashboard
translation_notes: WhDashboard React.useState for dismissed alerts and feedFilter → Server Component for initial data; client component only for dismiss state (use useOptimistic) and feed filter (URL search param via nuqs)
WH_KPIS mock data array → parallel Drizzle queries in Server Component; each KPI is a separate aggregate (COUNT, SUM); cache with unstable_cache(60s TTL per WH_SETTINGS.general.dashboardCacheTtl)
role prop gating canSeeValue → Next.js middleware + session from auth provider; restricted KPIs render server-side as locked if role not in ['Manager','Admin']

WH_ACTIVITY feed → fetched from lp_events / movements table ordered by created_at desc, limited to 50; filteredFeed client-side filter → server-side query parameter or client-side filter on pre-fetched data
Alerts panel (WH_ALERTS) → fetched from warehouse_alerts table; dismiss → Server Action updates alert dismissed_by_user junction; alert CTA buttons open modals via client component
Expiry summary widget with top-5 table → two separate Drizzle queries: COUNT by tier, SELECT top-5 by expiry_date; both in one RSC parallel fetch
Intermediate buffer widget → SELECT from lps WHERE item_type='intermediate' AND status='available'; dedicated sub-component
FEFO scoreboard → aggregate from fefo_overrides WHERE created_at > now()-7d; separate RSC or parallel data fetch
Activity feed filter dropdown → client island with useState or nuqs; pre-fetch all activity and filter client-side, or use URL params for server filter
Hardcoded PL labels + warehouse name → next-intl keys; warehouse from tenant config

label: lp_list_page
translation_notes: WhLPList client-side filtering → Next.js page with URL search params (nuqs) for tab, search, status, QA, warehouse, location, itemType, expiry range, strategy; Server Component fetches filtered data via Drizzle with WHERE clauses
Tab strip (All, Available, Reserved, Blocked, QC Hold, Intermediate) → link-based tabs using URL param ?tab=; counts from DB aggregate per tab
Filter bar with 'Show more' toggle → second row of filters in a Collapsible (shadcn); all filter state in URL for shareability
Bulk action bar (selected.size > 0) → client island; selection state via useReducer or Jotai atom; bulk actions call Server Actions for print, move, destroy
Row inline actions (Split, Print label, More menu) → DropdownMenu with items; all open modals via client modal state
Pagination (50/25/100 per page) → URL param ?page=&pageSize=; Drizzle LIMIT/OFFSET; show total count
Column sort (not yet wired in prototype) → add sortBy/sortDir URL params; Drizzle ORDER BY dynamic column
isExpired / isUrgent row class → computed server-side from expiry_date vs now(); return as a computed field or pass days_until_expiry from DB
Export CSV button → route handler /api/lps/export returning CSV via Drizzle query
Hardcoded PL column headers and filter labels → next-intl keys

label: lp_detail_page
translation_notes: WhLPDetail with WH_LP_DETAIL mock → Server Component fetches LP by id via Drizzle with all relations (movements, genealogy, reservations, stateHistory, qaHistory, labels, audit) as parallel queries

Tab navigation (7 tabs: Overview, Movements, Genealogy, Reservations, State, Labels, Audit) → URL search param ?tab= with Tabs component; tab content as separate sub-components each wrapped in Suspense
LP identity card left column → always-visible; action buttons (Split, Print, Move, Block, QA, Destroy) → client island wrapping modal triggers; RBAC guards on each button

Genealogy tab visualisation (gen-canvas, gen-node tree) → custom tree/DAG render; in production use react-flow or a CSS-based indented tree; FSMA 204 export button → Server Action generating PDF via Puppeteer edge function
Reservations tab with Release button → client island; release opens ReleaseReservationModal
State history and QA history feeds (tl-item timeline) → timeline from activity_feed table; shadcn has no Timeline primitive; compose from div + border-left trick or use a community Timeline component
Labels tab with Reprint → print_events table; Reprint button opens LabelPrintModal with existing LP data
Audit tab with CSV export → lp_audit_log table; export via route handler
ext_jsonb custom fields → read from lp.ext_jsonb column; display as key-value table; editor is a separate Phase 2 feature (BL-WH-06)
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: grn_list_page
translation_notes: WhGRNList client-side filter → URL search params for tab (status), search text, srcType, warehouse, date range, supplier; Server Component fetches filtered GRNs via Drizzle
Tab counts (All, Draft, Completed, Cancelled) → aggregate COUNT per status from DB; can be a single GROUP BY query
Filter bar selects (All sources, All warehouses, All suppliers) → options fetched from DB (distinct supplier names, warehouses); cache these lookup lists
Export CSV button → /api/grns/export route handler
Row click → navigate to GRN detail page; GRN table columns map to grns table columns
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: grn_detail_page
translation_notes: WhGRNDetail with WH_GRN_DETAIL mock → Server Component fetches GRN by id with items relation (created LPs) and statusHistory; no client state needed for read-only detail
wo-summary-bar metric strip → compose from a dl/dt/dd grid or a shadcn Card with grid layout; no dedicated shadcn primitive
LPs created table (g.items) → links each LP row to LP detail via onOpenLp → in production use Next.js Link component to /warehouse/lps/[id]
Status history timeline (.tl-item) → same timeline pattern as LP detail; see LP detail translation note on Timeline component
Export button → /api/grns/[id]/export route handler
g.notes → render only if present; text block in a Card
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: stock_movement_list_page
translation_notes: WhMovementList client-side filter → URL search params for tab, search, moveType, dateFrom, dateTo, location, lp, wo, user; Server Component fetches with Drizzle WHERE clauses

Side panel detail (.mv-side) → a Sheet (shadcn) that slides in from the right on row click; Sheet component replaces the absolute-positioned div; use useSearchParams or a local state atom to track selectedMv
Manager approvals tab with amber alert → filter movements where approval_status='pending'; dedicated DB query; approve/reject actions are Server Actions
Qty colouring (red for negative, green for positive) → cn() utility with conditional Tailwind classes; avoid inline styles in production
Ref links (WO- prefix → Open WO, GRN- prefix → Open GRN) → Next.js Link to respective detail pages
Export CSV → /api/movements/export route handler
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: reservations_list_page
translation_notes: WhReservations → Server Component fetches lp_reservations with lp and wo relations; tab filter (active/consumed/cancelled/all) via URL param
Summary strip (totalActiveKg, lockedLps, activeWos) → aggregate query: SUM(reserved_qty), COUNT(DISTINCT lp_id), COUNT(DISTINCT wo_id) filtered by status='active'; not computed client-side
Create reservation button → opens ReserveModal (client island)
Release button → opens ReleaseReservationModal with reservation data as prop
Info banner about hard-lock auto-creation → static content; render in shadcn Alert
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: inventory_browser_page
translation_notes: WhInventory with 3-view toggle (By product / By location / By batch) → URL param ?view=product|location|batch; each view is a separate Server Component rendering; all share the same filter bar
By-product expandable rows (inv-expand-ic toggle) → client island using Collapsible or accordion; on expand fetch LPs for that product via /api/inventory/lps?product=X or embed in initial payload
canSeeValue RBAC → server-side; pass hasValueAccess boolean from session; never expose value data in response if not authorized
By-location view with utilization bar → locations table LEFT JOIN lp_counts; util = lp_count / location.capacity; progress bar via shadcn Progress or a simple div
By-batch view → GROUP BY batch from lps table; show earliest expiry, total qty, LP count
Export CSV → /api/inventory/export?view=X route handler
Hardcoded PL column headers and filter labels → next-intl keys
BL-WH-05: By Location currently flat L2 table; production should support full ltree @> hierarchical browser

label: locations_hierarchy_page
translation_notes: WhLocations master-detail layout (tree left, detail right) → two-column grid; left side is a client island for tree selection state; right side re-renders on selection change via URL param ?loc=WH-Factory-A.Cold.B3
Location tree (.loc-tree, .loc-node) → custom tree component; no shadcn Tree primitive; use nested ul/li or a lightweight tree library; selected location keyed by ltree path
Bin occupancy mini-grid (.bin-grid, .bin-cell) → CSS grid; color class (empty/low/med/full) computed from utilization ratio; pass from server
Admin guard for edit/add buttons → from session RBAC; render conditionally server-side
Edit / Add Child / Deactivate buttons → open LocationEditModal (client island); deactivate → Server Action sets location.active=false with validation (block if LPs present)
LPs at this location table → fetched filtered by loc ltree @> path; paginated if > 25 (per prototype slice(0,25))
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys; location type icons are emoji in prototype — replace with Lucide icons in production

label: genealogy_traceability_page
translation_notes: WhGenealogy search + trace → URL param ?lp=&mode=backward|forward|full&depth=10; Server Component executes recursive CTE query on submit; Suspense boundary while querying

gen-canvas / gen-node tree render (CSS indented levels) → in production use react-flow or dagre-d3 for true DAG layout (per BACKLOG.md Q2 note for Planning; same applies here for Genealogy); prototype CSS indentation is only valid for linear chains
Forward/Backward/Full mode toggle → URL param; drives recursive CTE direction (WITH RECURSIVE upstream vs downstream); pass as server-side param
Depth range input → URL param; adds LIMIT on recursive CTE depth
Summary bar (nodes found, query time) → returned as metadata alongside query results from Server Action or route handler
FEFO compliance per node → annotated server-side by joining fefo_overrides on (lp_id, ref); fefo field on each node
Export FSMA 204 trace report (PDF) → Server Action calling Puppeteer edge function or a PDF generation library; button should be server-rendered with disabled state when no trace is loaded
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: expiry_management_page
translation_notes: WhExpiry tab toggle (Expired / Expiring soon) → URL param ?tab=expired|expiring; Server Component fetches expired LPs (expiry_date < now()) or expiring soon (expiry_date < now()+7d / +30d) with mode filter
mode filter pills (All modes / use_by / best_before) → URL param ?mode=; Drizzle WHERE shelf_life_mode = ?
Expired summary strip (count by mode and blocked status) → aggregate queries; can be parallel fetches in RSC
Cron info line (last-run timestamp, next 3 runs) → read from cron_jobs table or a cached config key; 'Run cron now' for Admin → Server Action triggering the expiry check job

Row actions are context-dependent (use_by expired → Destroy + Manager override; best_before expired → Block + Destroy; expiring → View LP) → derive from lp.shelf_life_mode + lp.status server-side; render appropriate action buttons
Two info cards (use_by EU 1169/2011, best_before) → static content in shadcn Cards with colored left border; no dynamic data
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: warehouse_settings_page
translation_notes: WhSettings left-nav sidebar + content area → two-column layout matching prototype; sidebar uses a vertical nav list; active category highlighted; sticky sidebar via position:sticky
Settings categories (9 cats) → URL param ?cat=general|numbering|grn|...; each cat is a separate form component; Server Component loads current settings from warehouse_settings table
isAdmin RBAC → all inputs disabled if not Admin; read-only banner shown; derive from session server-side; never trust client-side isAdmin
dirty state + unsaved changes bar → client island using useFormState; shadcn has no Unsaved Changes banner — compose from a sticky div + Button group
Each category form → useForm per category; submit calls category-specific Server Action that validates + upserts warehouse_settings rows; optimistic UI with useOptimistic
Locations and Integrations tabs are ScaffoldedScreen placeholders → render a simple placeholder Card in production until these sub-pages are built
WH_PRINTERS in labels cat → fetched from printers table; default printer select pulls live list
Rule registry links (fefo_strategy_v1, lp_state_machine_v1) → link to Settings → Rule Registry when built (SET-050 from BACKLOG.md)
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys; all setting labels and help text
BL-WH-02: Locations tab and Integrations tab are placeholders; full CRUD is on the Locations hierarchy page

label: app_sidebar
translation_notes: PSidebar static markup → Next.js layout.tsx with shadcn Sidebar (or SidebarProvider + Sidebar from shadcn/ui sidebar recipe); use Next.js Link for navigation items
Active state (className='active') → derive from usePathname() comparing to each item's href; or use Next.js Link's active class pattern
Module groups (Core, Operations, QA & Shipping, Premium) → sidebar section headers using SidebarGroupLabel
Icons (emoji ic spans) → replace with Lucide React icons mapped per module
Hardcoded module labels → next-intl keys

label: app_topbar
translation_notes: PTopbar global search input → shadcn CommandDialog (cmd+K palette) backed by a search API route; or a plain Input with a search route
Role switch buttons → prototype-only demo device; in production derive role from session; remove from production build
Auto-refresh dot + Refresh now button → client island using a polling SWR or React Query with refetchInterval; display last-refreshed timestamp
Avatar → shadcn Avatar component displaying user initials from session; tooltip with name + role + warehouse
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: warehouse_sub_nav
translation_notes: WhNav vertical sub-nav for the warehouse module → secondary sidebar or a nested nav inside the main sidebar; use SidebarMenu inside a sub-group
WH_NAV mock (groups + items with key/label/ic/count/hero) → fetched from a navigation config or hardcoded; count badges from DB aggregate queries (e.g. pending alerts count)
nav-count badge on items → live count from DB; cache server-side with short TTL or update via SWR
hero 'Live' badge → static badge on configured items; driven by nav config flag
Footer (version, warehouse name, LP count, cron status, printer status) → small status strip; data from warehouse_status API endpoint
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys
